Lizard Blood Potion  
 


EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Cazic Gate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 35
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Cazic Gate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 35
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Race: ALL

QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2002 at 5:12 PM Rating: Good
Tuluvar
View User Forum
352 posts
Hehe this will be not so usefull anymore, often used as a quick death escape by the higher lvl ppl coz of instant cast, it now puts you in an even worse situation prolly =)
____________________________
Tuluvar
▲ Page top
RE: Updated CT
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2002 at 4:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757435113
13 posts
Actually as a 60 Ranger I still use this as an escape potion. I have wandered the maze and there are never any see invis mobs up in the dirrection of the zone. The spires are also a safe area and the maze is not prone to trains meaning plenty of time to get wolf form (for speed faster than sow) and invis up. It is acually a safer gate potion for lower levels now than it ever was **as long as you have sow, invis, and know the maze well.
▲ Page top
RE: Updated CT
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2002 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752664645
Scholar
64 posts
FYI:
The wiz spire is safe from aggro. Only if people pull on you will a mob attack you. With invis you can make it to zone *if you stick to the straight path to door*(Haven't seen a see invis mob there yet, just elsewhere in maze if you get lost) but beware in CY, above the double doors VI stuck a see invis mob, an aggressor. All liz outrun jboots/run3, so you need sow or faster to have a chance once aggro'd. Best bet is to wait for a wiz to come get ya.

The potion is INSTANT cast, making it much better than velium vapors and such. Being non LORE, you can camp for a few of them.
▲ Page top
RE: Updated CT
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2002 at 5:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779538610
7 posts
There are see invis mobs in the maze and all thru out Cazic and i am a 36 shaman, And was killed by a Tae Ew Blood-something..that saw invis. just FYI
▲ Page top
potion
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2001 at 4:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251957907
View User Forum
11 posts
this is found on the lizard cenobite inside the bubble in Cazic Thule the zone. its a rare drop and the common is ravenscale boots.

It usually goes for 600pp but prices will vary on server to where pvp servers they fetch high prices because of the ability to cause massive trains to kill the enemies but then gate to safety.

2 posts
Cazic Cenobite in Avator bubble in the ponds

Great to use when late for Fear raids, or tank almost to die and high enough to not catch lizzie aggro

Anonymous
can't invis =(, its an instant potion, so pray then the lizards are in the process of being killed, or u can be high enuff to the point where they can't hit u very well and u can beat the living dog shi.... out of them. or Ench can just mez and head for the zone


50th Shaman Fudnick Susanowo
41st Dark Knight Oombak Fatalwind
12th Enchanter Zamtin

May Cazic-Thule eat you.. (i mean the god cazic-thule, cause my knight worships him MUAHAHHA)

# Apr 27 2001 at 8:01 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
dude there's no such thing as a potion to the plane of fear--what kind of moron are you? You can't get into the planes until level 46--you think they'd have this drop in a level 30ish dungeion if it ported you to the plane of fear? christ how ignorant can one be?
▲ Page top
Destination
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2001 at 5:35 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754859591
10 posts
It used to be a random location in Cazic Thule dungeon. Now it seems to teleport mostly to the Wizard gate platform in the maze.

And yes, I have used them several times, and do know exactly of that which I speak.

Ane
▲ Page top
right
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2001 at 11:18 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This potion ports you to the wizard spire in the middle of the maze area in Cazic-Thule. This potion is sought after by non-gating people that are in a plane raid.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 16 2001 at 1:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this ports you to the gate in PoF not to cazic thule the zone dumb ***. i have one sitting the bank. dont post if ya dont know!

I am not positive, But I belive this is used to teleport a person to a pad at the back of the maze in Cazic-Thule. You might want to be invis before porting. Prolly only make that mistake once.
